proposals.proposed_value: Do not leave affected person unattended. Remove victim out of the danger area. Keep affected person warm, still and covered. Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. In all cases of doubt, or when symptoms persist, seek medical advice. In case of unconsciousness place person in the recovery position. Never give anything by mouth.
proposals.source_excerpt: Do not leave affected person unattended. Remove victim out of the danger area. Keep affected person warm, still and covered. Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. In all cases of doubt, or when symptoms persist, seek medical advice. In case of unconsciousness place person in the recovery position. Never give anything by mouth.
proposals.rationale: General first-aid guidance applicable across all exposure routes, not specific to one route.

proposals.proposed_value: If breathing is irregular or stopped, immediately seek medical assistance and start first aid actions. In case of respiratory tract irritation, consult a physician. Provide fresh air.
proposals.source_excerpt: If breathing is irregular or stopped, immediately seek medical assistance and start first aid actions. In case of respiratory tract irritation, consult a physician. Provide fresh air.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specifically for inhalation exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Wash with plenty of soap and water.
proposals.source_excerpt: Wash with plenty of soap and water.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instruction specifically for skin contact exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Irrigate copiously with clean, fresh water for at least 10 minutes, holding the eyelids apart.
proposals.source_excerpt: Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Irrigate copiously with clean, fresh water for at least 10 minutes, holding the eyelids apart.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specifically for eye contact exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Rinse mouth with water (only if the person is conscious). Do NOT induce vomiting.
proposals.source_excerpt: Rinse mouth with water (only if the person is conscious). Do NOT induce vomiting.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specifically for ingestion exposure.
